spec_match.rationale: Side-by-side auto vs manual editor with the same keyframes — demonstrates the exact problem the spec was written to solve.

interactive.rationale: Two contenteditable editors running the same animation, visible difference when focused.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Blurb promises a side-by-side; the page is exactly that.

edge_cases.rationale: Doesn't show unfocused state, multi-cursor selection, or caret-color set without animation.

references.rationale: See-also block reference needs verification — chromestatus.com/feature/5082469066604544 required (invariant 3).

openQuestions.title: Show unfocused state
openQuestions.detail: Animation pauses when input loses focus. Add a blur button and explainer.

openQuestions.title: Multi-caret / contenteditable selection
openQuestions.detail: Some browsers / extensions support multi-cursor in contenteditable. Does each animate independently?

summary: The clearest 'why this exists' demo of the bunch — side-by-side stutter vs smooth proves the value at a glance. Edge case coverage would round it out.
